special_mechanics.name: Flight
special_mechanics.description: Opa-Opa, a winged sentient spaceship, can either fly or walk on the ground

special_mechanics.name: Bidirectional Scrolling
special_mechanics.description: Screen scrolls left or right depending on Opa-Opa's direction, similar to Defender

special_mechanics.name: Speed Upgrades
special_mechanics.description: Player can purchase speed upgrades using collected gold coins to improve Opa-Opa's movement

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Source material is Wikipedia article focusing on gameplay, reception, and development rather than technical physics specifications. No quantitative movement parameters documented.
